cross_reference.config/training_runs.json: dropout already 0.05 in legacy training runs
cross_reference.delta: this knob promotes the same value into r13 SSOT and adds explicit kl_reg_weight

wiring.fallback_behavior: dropout=0, kl_reg=0 (current r13 default if env var unset)

expected_signal: overfit prevention; val loss stability at validated default values
risk: minimal (validated default values per ROI doc)
rollback: unset ANIMA_DROPOUT_KL_REG; runner reverts to dropout=0, no KL term
